meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to leverage user onboarding to overcome no project ideas. An intermediate-level guide for founders using Antigravity and Claude Code tools.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for the 'perfect' idea and start building a high-conversion onboarding flow. By focusing on user friction, you uncover real pain points. Use Antigravity to scaffold your MVP and Claude Code to iterate. Solving the onboarding bottleneck turns stagnant prototypes into revenue-generating SaaS products immediately.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the silent killer of ambition. You’re staring at a cursor, paralyzed by the 'no project ideas' trap, while the market screams for solutions to simple, daily frustrations. Most founders overthink the core product while ignoring the only metric that matters: the first five minutes of user experience.

True innovation isn't about inventing a new category; it's about friction removal. By building a world-class onboarding flow, you force yourself to define the user’s journey, their pain, and your value proposition. This is how you transform a vague concept into a validated MVP that users actually pay for.

steps.title: Define the Value-First Onboarding Loop
steps.description: Identify the 'Aha!' moment. Don't ask for emails first; show value. Map out the sequence that delivers a win in under 60 seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js onboarding flow with a multi-step form state machine. Include a progress indicator and a mock 'Aha!' moment component that simulates data processing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a new Next.js component for a 3-step onboarding flow with Framer Motion transitions.'

steps.title: Build the Skeleton with Antigravity
steps.description: Rapidly generate the database schema and API routes required to track user progress during the onboarding process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a User model with an 'onboarding_step' integer field and a 'setup_completed' boolean. Create the corresponding API route to update this progress.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply the new Prisma schema and generate the API handler for updating user onboarding status.'

steps.title: Implement Contextual AI Guidance
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject AI-driven help tooltips that appear when users linger on a specific input field, reducing drop-off rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable Tooltip component that accepts dynamic content. Integrate a mock AI helper function that triggers when the user focuses on an input for more than 5 seconds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Refactor the registration form to include the new AI-driven Tooltip component.'

steps.title: Optimize for Revenue Conversion
steps.description: Integrate a paywall or tier-selection step directly into the flow to validate willingness-to-pay early in the journey.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a pricing table component to the final step of the onboarding flow. Include a 'Start Free Trial' button that updates the user record status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add Stripe checkout integration to the final onboarding step and link to the user record.'

steps.title: Deploy and Instrument Analytics
steps.description: Attach tracking to every step of your flow to see exactly where users drop off, allowing for data-driven pivots.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add event tracking to the onboarding steps. Use a standard tracking utility that sends events to a PostHog-style endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Instrument the onboarding flow with analytics tracking events on every step transition.'

pro_tips: Never ask for a credit card until the user has successfully completed their first 'win' inside the app.
Use 'Magic Links' for authentication to remove the friction of password creation during onboarding.
A/B test your onboarding copy; small changes in button text can increase conversion by 20% or more.
If a user drops off, trigger a personalized email sequence that highlights the specific step they didn't finish.
Keep your onboarding flow under 3 steps; if you need more, you are likely trying to build too much at once.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, push it to your target audience on Reddit or X. Use the analytics data collected to identify which step causes the most churn, then use Claude Code to re-engineer that specific interaction.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn a simple idea into a high-converting machine. The only barrier left is your own execution speed. Stop waiting for the perfect moment. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
